content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 21, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
May 21 saw significant progress in plugin unification and OAuth capabilities. Key achievements include the completion of the "Plugin/mode" architecture, enabling remote-mode plugins and sub-agent runners. We also expanded Eliza Cloud OAuth to support dual OWNER/AGENT roles across Google and Slack connectors, improved Windows support for Discord desktop control, and introduced the `plugin-undesirables` personality-as-code plugin.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Plugin/Mode Unification & Remote Runtime**
*   Completed the four-phase unification of the Plugin architecture, enabling `direct` and `remote` modes ([#7844](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7844), [#7846](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7846), [#7847](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7847)).
*   Shipped the `installRemotePlugin` API and the first sub-agent runner (`plugin-sub-agent-claude-code`) ([#7848](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7848)).

**OAuth & Connector Enhancements**
*   Enabled dual OWNER+AGENT role support for Google and Slack via Eliza Cloud OAuth, allowing agents to act on behalf of users ([#7852](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7852), [#7868](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7868), [#7876](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7876)).
*   Improved UI state management for OAuth buttons and standardized role-handling logic ([#7866](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7866), [#7841](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7841), [#7874](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7874)).

**Platform & Ecosystem Expansion**
*   Enabled Discord Desktop CDP control on Windows ([#7870](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7870)).
*   Added `plugin-undesirables`, mapping 4,444 Ethereum NFTs to unique AI agent personalities ([#7869](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7869)).
*   Extensive dependency updates across CI/CD workflows and benchmarking packages ([#7856](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7856), [#7857](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7857), [#7858](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7858), [#7859](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7859), [#7860](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7860), [#7861](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7861)).

**System Stability & Fixes**
*   Resolved critical database migration failures in `cloud-deploy-backend` ([#7853](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7853)).
*   Improved RISC-V release gate validation and chip-related artifact handling ([#7873](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7873), [#7875](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7875)).
*   Fixed local source probe routing and training script registry imports ([#7872](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7872), [#7867](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7867)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7888](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7888) docs: Add FAQ section for common questions.
*   [#7886](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7886) refactor(cloud): kill containers feature, merge into agents UI.
*   [#7885](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7885) fix(cloud-frontend): rename landing button to Dashboard.
*   [#7883](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7883) feat: add NEAR AI inference provider.
*   [#7882](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7882) fix(plugin-slack): drop unnecessary as-unknown cast on user WebClient.
*   [#7881](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7881) fix: stabilize gpt-oss routing and opencode handoffs.
*   [#7880](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7880) fix(test): allowlist known service type migrations.
*   [#7878](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7878) fix(desktop): bundle runtime packages for Windows.
*   [#7877](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7877) fix(chip): keep source-only riscv checks clean.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
**Agent Identity & Verification**
*   [#7884](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7884) Community member introduced an Agent Identity Verification dApp utilizing existing ERC-8004 contracts.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
